items.title: Did Salesforce’s (CRM) Small AI Revenue Base and Higher API Costs Just Recast Its Margin Story?
items.description: In early January 2026, Salesforce’s latest updates on its AI products, particularly Agentforce and Data 360, highlighted strong interest but underscored that these offerings still contribute less than 3.5% of total revenue, leaving questions about their current financial weight. The company’s push to raise API and integration costs while acquiring AI marketing firm Qualified has sharpened the debate over whether Salesforce’s AI ambitions can enhance margins without alienating customers or...

items.description: The generative AI in chatbots market is poised for rapid growth, driven by rising demand for personalized interactions, cloud integration, and automation in customer service. Key opportunities lie in expanding multilingual capabilities, healthcare and banking adoption, and increasing enterprise digital transformation.
